blockers.description: ADR-001: flutter_blue_plus not wired in background_service.dart
SEC-001: Firebase App Check not enforced in Cloud Functions

decisions.decision: All 27 registration steps extracted to individual files in widgets/registration_steps/
Consent state (4 booleans) moved fully into ConsentStep
decisions.rationale: Only needed locally; step ensures consent before calling onComplete

decisions.decision: Password controllers kept in parent (emailController, passwordController, locationController)
decisions.rationale: Used by _registerUser and completeRegistration in parent

decisions.decision: ExpansibleController for hobby tiles moved into HobbiesStep internal state

next_action: Commit Phase 2D completion, then start Phase 8 (RevenueCat/Paywall) or Phase 9 Step 3 (App Check enforcement)
context_notes: Phase 2D is fully complete. registration_flow.dart reduced from ~3046 lines to ~1400 lines. All 27 steps extracted. flutter analyze clean. Need to commit and update tasks/context.md.
